keyPointsSummary: Direct speech uses quotation marks; reported (indirect) speech reports what someone said without quotes
Present simple becomes past simple; present continuous becomes past continuous; present perfect becomes past perfect
Pronouns and time words often change (I -> he/she, today -> that day)

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
quickQuiz.answer: He said that he was tired.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह स्कूल जाती थी।
quickQuiz.answer: She said that she went to school.

quickQuiz.hindi: उन्होंने कहा कि वे खुश थे।
quickQuiz.answer: They said that they were happy.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैंने खाना खा लिया है।"
उसने कहा कि उसने खाना खा लिया था।
quickQuiz.answer: He said that he had eaten food.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं यह कर रहा हूँ।"
उसने कहा कि वह यह कर रहा था।
quickQuiz.answer: He said that he was doing this.

mustRememberRules: Direct speech uses quotation marks; reported (indirect) speech reports what someone said without quotes
Present simple becomes past simple; present continuous becomes past continuous; present perfect becomes past perfect
Pronouns and time words often change (I -> he/she, today -> that day)
